description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to document the advanced error handling, retry policies, and observability enhancements. Refine the Mermaid diagram to show X-Ray tracing, CloudWatch Alarms, and Dashboard as implemented (green). Add sections on error handling strategy and observability stack.
steps: Update the Implementation Status section in ARCHITECTURE.md to add the new implemented components: X-Ray tracing (Lambda and State Machine), CloudWatch Alarms (ExecutionsFailed, Lambda Errors), CloudWatch Dashboard, granular Catch blocks, Polly retry policy.

Update the Orchestration Layer section to document the enhanced error handling: granular Catch blocks for specific error types (Lambda.ServiceException, Polly.ServiceException) in addition to the existing States.ALL catch-all.
Update the Observability section to reflect that X-Ray tracing is now implemented (not just planned), and that CloudWatch Alarms and a Dashboard skeleton are deployed.
Update the Mermaid diagram: change CWLogs, CWAlarms, XRay from planned (gray/dashed) to implemented (green/solid). Add the CloudWatch Dashboard node as implemented.
Remove CloudWatch Alarms from the Planned table since they are now implemented.
Run mvn test to confirm documentation changes did not break anything (they should not since ARCHITECTURE.md is not code).
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md Observability section documents X-Ray tracing as enabled on Lambda and State Machine
ARCHITECTURE.md documents CloudWatch Alarms for state machine failures and Lambda errors
ARCHITECTURE.md documents the enhanced retry policies (Polly task retry with specific errors)
Mermaid diagram shows CWLogs, CWAlarms, XRay, and Dashboard as implemented (green styling)
Planned table no longer lists CloudWatch Alarms
mvn test still passes after documentation update
verification: Run mvn test and confirm all tests pass
Read ARCHITECTURE.md and verify the Observability section mentions X-Ray tracing enabled, CloudWatch Alarms created, Dashboard deployed
